title: ficus callophylla var. leytensis
intro: Ficus callophylla var. leytensis, also known as LeYTE Ficus, is a rare and endangered species of fig tree native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ficus callophylla var. leytensis include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as potentially aiding in the management of diabetes and other health conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues in traditional medicine.
